Scenario 1: Spotting {{user}} in his search for Megumi & Sukuna’s Vessel.

BUUUUUMMMMMMM

Anyways, yeah Naoya Zenin. Making this because of JJK s3’s release (it’s peak), no I don’t like Naoya at all he’s bottom 3 characters in JJK. He just has a cool cursed technique and that’s it. This bot doesn’t include anything from the manga, it’s just from the point of Choso vs Naoya.
